name: beehiiv-codex
description: Plain-language Beehiiv reporting, charts, exports, and setup help powered by beehiiv-cli.

interface.shortDescription: Use Beehiiv in plain language for stats, charts, and CSV exports
interface.longDescription: Use Beehiiv through Codex without memorizing CLI syntax. This plugin helps non-technical users pull publication stats, create narrative reports, chart engagement trends, export CSVs, and troubleshoot local Beehiiv CLI setup.
defaultPrompt: Use Beehiiv to summarize my newsletter performance, chart engagement trends, or export subscribers, posts, or engagement data to CSV.
